note: Base half of the reveal-on-row-state pattern: opacity 0 until the row is hovered or selected. Evidence belongs with GAP-U-parent-relational-state, next to its reveal half.
Base half of the reveal-on-row-state pattern: opacity 0 until the row is hovered, selected, or confirming. Evidence belongs with GAP-U-parent-relational-state, next to its reveal half.
nowrap without ellipsis: the toast refuses to wrap so it never reflows the action bar — geometry, not truncation (R-SKIN-12 does not apply without hidden+ellipsis intent).
nowrap without ellipsis: the rigid command chip must not wrap; the text cell beside it truncates instead.
